segments.text: As a result, Aya Lin is just in full control here, Cass.
Once again, looking to the edgeguard, but Sora is not an easy character to edgeguard.

full_text: As a result, Aya Lin is just in full control here, Cass. Absolutely, yeah. Once again, looking to the edgeguard, but Sora is not an easy character to edgeguard.
